title: sideroxylon lanuginosum subsp. rigidum
intro: Sideroxylon lanuginosum subsp. rigidum, also known as the Woolly Rigid Mastic Tree, is a plant species within the family Sapotaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Sideroxylon lanuginosum subsp. rigidum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
